THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODMAN LUMBER COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER INNOVATIONS $308.14 PRINCIPAL, $65.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $373.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
